name: Carrot Cake with Cream Cheese Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 9-inch round cake pan and dust with flour. Tap out excess.
3. Mix together the flour, cinnamon, baking powder, and salt.
4. Beat together butter and sugar at medium speed until light and fluffy.
5. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. At low speed, alternately beat in the flour mixture and milk into the butter mixture.
7. Stir in grated carrots and chopped walnuts. Pour batter into prepared pan.
8. Bake cake until top springs back when lightly touched and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 40 minutes.
9. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let cool for 10 minutes. Turn cake out onto the rack and allow it to cool completely.
10. Prepare icing: Beat together butter and cream cheese at medium speed until completely smooth. Add vanilla and beat in confectioners sugar until well blended.
11. To prepare topping, mix together chopped walnuts and brown sugar.
12. Place cake on a serving plate. Spread icing over the top and sides of the cake. Sprinkle with the nut topping mixture.
